bio: Iranian diplomat who served as Minister of Foreign Affairs from 2013 to 2021 under President Hassan Rouhani. Led the Iranian negotiating team for the JCPOA nuclear deal. Previously served as Iran's Ambassador to the United Nations (2002–2007). Named in the 2023 Semafor investigation into the Iran Experts Initiative.
editorial_notes: Key figure in IEI network. Cross-reference with Semafor reporting on email leaks.
